/CAL:MODIFICATION OF MOP SENTENCE/INTC/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT'S HOME DETENTION HAS THE FOLLOWING CUTOUTS:/X:THE DEFENDANT MAY GO TO WORK FROM 6AM TO 6PM/X:THE DEFENDANT MAY ATTEND AA MEETINGS FROM 7PM TO 9PM ON MONDAYS, WEDNESDAYS & SATURDAYS/X:DEFENDANT TO CHECK IN WITH THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT TO GIVE THEM THESE AMENDED HOME DETENTION TERMS/X:THE COURT CONFIRMS THE FUTURE COURT DATE/

/CAL:SENTENCE/INTC/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 5 Y:PJ 6 M/CTS: 1/IND/WS/WEAP/CTORD:THE BALANCE OF CUSTODY TIME MAY BE SERVED THROUGH HOME DETENTION/DNACOMP/STATES/MOP1/CTORD:THIS PROGRAM SHALL BE FOR A PERIOD OF 18 MONTHS/NALC/CTORD:THE NO ALCOHOL CONDITION IS IN EFFECT FOR A PERIOD OF 1 YEAR/X: THE DEFENDANT SHALL PAY A BASE FINE OF $525 PLUS $1536 IN ASSESSMENTS FOR A FINEAMOUNT OF $2061,/LSUSF:TBD BY CALIFORNIA DMV/LVAL/LCHEM/IID:3 YEARS/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/         /VF4:300/PROBFINE/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/X:AS A CONDITION OF PROBATION, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON ELECTRONICMONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH GPS AND SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CTORD:ANY TERMS & CONDITIONS FROM #16000603 ARE HARVEYWAIVED INTO THIS GRANT OF PROBATION/30    CAPD PPRF REPORT, DOP/PPRFCUST/PPRFRPT:11-12-20/CONTD:PPRF COMPLIANCE REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION & MOP COMPLIANCE REPORT IN DEPARTMENT 30/DOPU:PPRF UNIT HAS VERIFIED COMPLIANCE WITH PC 29810,/

/CAL PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/TEXT DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ET PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:001/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/ADPRS1:VC 23152(A) IN THE COUNTY OF ALAMEDA ON 06-08-2010 AND VC 23152(A) IN THE COUNTYOF SAN FRANCISCO ON 03-10-2017/PRES:10-30-20/PPRF/ARBUCKLE/TWS/CONTD:SENTENCE/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TN:EMETRIO H MARTINEZ/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THERECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE TODAY01-17-20,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/NTW60/LDPX:03-17-20/987,2/CONTD:PREHEARING HEARING/DOP/
